title: First Merged PR
description: Successfully merged your first pull request on GitHub.

title: Gerrit Contributor
description: Merged your first patch set in Gerrit.

title: Wikipedia Editor
description: Contributed verified historical references to en.wikipedia.org.

title: 10-Day Streak
description: Maintain active contributions for 10 consecutive days.

title: Polyglot Contributor
description: Contributed across 3 or more distinct platforms.
